name: pulseLoop
purpose: Gentle, endless pulsing — continuous scaling between rest and target (compositor-friendly, e.g. a subtle attention pulse on CTAs).
template:
{{css target}} { animation: motion-pulseLoop-{{css id}} {{css params.duration}}s ease-in-out infinite alternate; }
@keyframes motion-pulseLoop-{{css id}} { from { transform: scale(1) } to { transform: scale({{css params.scale}}) } }
